Index: =================================================================== --- +++ @@ -1,89 +1,117 @@ -# Roadmap +
-This document outlines the planned evolution of **ErrorPilot**. +# ErrorPilot -The roadmap is divided into major milestones, but priorities may change as the project evolves and community feedback is received. +### Analyze. Prioritize. Fix. +Open-source PHP Log Analyzer & Interactive Error Diagnostics Dashboard. + +
+ +![Python](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3.11+-3776AB?logo=python&logoColor=white) +![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-green) +![PHP](https://img.shields.io/badge/PHP-Logs-777BB4?logo=php&logoColor=white) +![Dashboard](https://img.shields.io/badge/Dashboard-HTML-blue) +![Status](https://img.shields.io/badge/Status-v1.0.0-blueviolet) + +

+ + + +
+ --- -# Version 1.1 +## Why ErrorPilot? -## Dashboard +Large PHP applications can generate thousands or even hundreds of thousands of repeated log entries. -- [ ] File ranking -- [ ] File detail view -- [ ] Health Score -- [ ] Most affected lines -- [ ] User interface improvements +ErrorPilot helps developers turn noisy PHP logs into actionable insights by automatically grouping repeated errors, prioritizing issues, and generating an interactive dashboard. -## Log Comparison +> Stop reading logs manually. Start fixing what really matters. -- [ ] Compare two log files -- [ ] Detect newly introduced issues -- [ ] Detect resolved issues -- [ ] Calculate improvement percentage +--- -## History +## What it does -- [ ] Save previous analyses -- [ ] Historical dashboard -- [ ] Trend visualization +| Feature | Description | +|---|---| +| Error normalization | Groups repeated errors into clear issue types. | +| Smart prioritization | Classifies problems as Critical, High, Medium, or Low. | +| Interactive dashboard | Generates a visual HTML report from your logs. | +| Searchable table | Quickly filter errors by message, file, or priority. | +| Export formats | Generate JSON and CSV reports. | +| Local server | Open the dashboard automatically with `--serve`. | --- -# Version 1.2 +## Quick Start -## Recommendations +```bash +python analyzer.py samples/php-errors.log --serve +``` -- [ ] Rule engine -- [ ] Error explanations -- [ ] PHP best practices -- [ ] Suggested fixes +This command will: -## Exporters +1. Analyze the log file. +2. Generate the reports. +3. Start a local web server. +4. Open the dashboard automatically. -- [ ] Microsoft Excel -- [ ] Markdown -- [ ] PDF \ No newline at end of file -- [ ] Discord -- [ ] Slack -- [ ] Microsoft Teams +--- +## Sample Logs + +ErrorPilot includes sample logs so you can try it immediately: + +| File | Description | +|---|---| +| `samples/php-errors.log` | Standard PHP error log | +| `samples/apache-error.log` | Apache + PHP error log | +| `samples/laravel.log` | Laravel-style production log | +| `samples/symfony.log` | Symfony-style application log | +| `samples/wordpress.log` | WordPress plugin/theme errors | + --- -# Version 2.0 +## Use Cases -## Project Analysis +- ERP systems +- Legacy PHP applications +- Laravel applications +- Symfony applications +- WordPress sites +- CodeIgniter projects +- Custom PHP platforms -- [ ] Analyze an entire directory -- [ ] Analyze multiple log files -- [ ] Project configuration file +--- -## Source Code Integration +## Documentation -- [ ] Open the affected source file -- [ ] Display code context -- [ ] Highlight the affected line +| Document | Description | +|---|---| +| [GUIDE.md](GUIDE.md) | Usage guide and CLI options | +| [DEVELOPER.md](DEVELOPER.md) | Internal architecture and extension guide | +| [ROADMAP.md](ROADMAP.md) | Planned features and future direction | +| [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md) | Version history | +| [DECISIONS.md](DECISIONS.md) | Technical and architectural decisions | -## Artificial Intelligence +--- -- [ ] OpenAI integration -- [ ] Ollama integration -- [ ] DeepSeek integration -- [ ] Claude integration +## Roadmap -## Command-Line Interface +- File ranking +- File detail view +- Health Score +- Log comparison +- Analysis history +- Automatic recommendations +- Optional AI integration -- [ ] Installable CLI (`errorpilot`) +See the full roadmap in [ROADMAP.md](ROADMAP.md). -## Monitoring +--- -- [ ] Real-time mode -- [ ] Continuous monitoring -- [ ] Auto-refresh dashboard +## License -## Quality - -- [ ] Unit tests -- [ ] GitHub Actions -- [ ] Test coverage +MIT License. \ No newline at end of file

commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
# Roadmap

This document outlines the planned evolution of **ErrorPilot**.

The roadmap is divided into major milestones, but priorities may change as the project evolves and community feedback is received.

---

# Version 1.1

## Dashboard

- [ ] File ranking
- [ ] File detail view
- [ ] Health Score
- [ ] Most affected lines
- [ ] User interface improvements

## Log Comparison

- [ ] Compare two log files
- [ ] Detect newly introduced issues
- [ ] Detect resolved issues
- [ ] Calculate improvement percentage

## History

- [ ] Save previous analyses
- [ ] Historical dashboard
- [ ] Trend visualization

---

# Version 1.2

## Recommendations

- [ ] Rule engine
- [ ] Error explanations
- [ ] PHP best practices
- [ ] Suggested fixes

## Exporters

- [ ] Microsoft Excel
- [ ] Markdown
- [ ] PDF
- [ ] Discord
- [ ] Slack
- [ ] Microsoft Teams

---

# Version 2.0

## Project Analysis

- [ ] Analyze an entire directory
- [ ] Analyze multiple log files
- [ ] Project configuration file

## Source Code Integration

- [ ] Open the affected source file
- [ ] Display code context
- [ ] Highlight the affected line

## Artificial Intelligence

- [ ] OpenAI integration
- [ ] Ollama integration
- [ ] DeepSeek integration
- [ ] Claude integration

## Command-Line Interface

- [ ] Installable CLI (`errorpilot`)

## Monitoring

- [ ] Real-time mode
- [ ] Continuous monitoring
- [ ] Auto-refresh dashboard

## Quality

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] GitHub Actions
- [ ] Test coverage
